acute sense.desc: Add Blood Potency to sensory rolls; exceptional successes may cause Obsession.

alley cat.desc: Reduces threshold for exceptional success when prowling city streets.

allies.desc: Access to influence or help from allied groups.

altar.desc: Attuned altar tied to covenant practice; contributors can teamwork Crúac rituals.

alternate identity.desc: Maintain one or more false identities.

anointed.desc: Ordained priest; once per session roll Presence + Expression to preach Raptured Condition.

anonymity.desc: Harder to identify or find due to obscurity.

army of one.desc: Roll Presence + Politics + Carthian Status to summon Carthian backup (1 per point per story).

atrocious.desc: 8-Again on monstrous Beast, lose 10-Again on seductive/competitive Beast.

attaché.desc: Retainers gain access to Invictus Status points distributed among Contacts, Resources, Safe Place.

barfly.desc: Skilled at making connections in nightlife and bars.

beloved.desc: Deep bond with a living Touchstone; +1 to resist detachment after spending time.

bloodhound.desc: Smell blood as if tasting it with Kindred Senses.

breaking the chains.desc: Break blood bonds through collective Carthian feeding.

cacophony savvy.desc: Knowledge of the Cacophony network grants information access.

call the beast.desc: Use Animalism on revenants; contested by Resolve + Vitae.

carthian pull.desc: Recognised for your influence in Carthian politics.

casual user.desc: Gain Carthian Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

cease fire.desc: Force Willpower cost on all Discipline use in domain.

chorister.desc: Gain Crone Status 1 benefits; may learn Crúac rites; once per story call favour.

claws of the unholy.desc: In frenzy, Protean claws count as aggravated with no weapon bonus.

close family.desc: Blood sympathy stronger: +1 and 8-Again, but can't spend Willpower that scene.

closed book.desc: Hard to read, resistant to prying eyes.

common sense.desc: Once per session, ask the Storyteller for advice when stuck.

court jester.desc: Reputation punishes official censure, stripping a point of City Status from opponents.

crowdsourcing.desc: Spend Willpower and roll Manipulation + Academics to shift Social Merit points between Invictus.

cutthroat.desc: 8-Again on competitive Beast, lose 10-Again on monstrous/seductive Beast.

danger sense.desc: +2 to notice ambushes or avoid surprise.

demolisher.desc: Can smash through barriers more effectively.

devotion experimenter.desc: Reroll nines with Devotions; learn/teach them at an XP discount.

direction sense.desc: Always know which way is north; strong innate sense of direction.

distinguished palate.desc: Taste of Blood always exceptional; lose first Vitae if vessel lacks your delicacy.

double jointed.desc: Flexible body grants +2 to escape restraints or contort.

dream visions.desc: Once nightly, roll BP for prophetic dream answering a question.

dynasty membership.desc: Membership in a powerful family dynasty.

eidetic memory.desc: Recall precise details of past events.

empower judiciary.desc: Grant legal authority to designated Kindred.

encyclopaedic knowledge.desc: Broad general knowledge on many subjects.

enticing.desc: 8-Again on seductive Beast, lose 10-Again on monstrous/competitive Beast.

establish precedent.desc: Lock legal rulings with supernatural enforcement.

eye for the strange.desc: Intuition for the supernatural and occult.

faith militant.desc: May draw upon Herd as Resources.

fame.desc: Recognised in mortal society; adds dice to relevant social rolls.

feeding grounds.desc: Bonus equal to points for hunting and Predatory Aura in your claimed turf.

fighting finesse.desc: Use Dexterity instead of Strength for fighting with this skill.

flock.desc: Inspire Herd; gain Willpower and extra Herd points equal to Flock points.

friends in high places.desc: Each month, open up to Invictus Status in Doors of those under Invictus control.

fucking thief.desc: Steal flawed knowledge of a one-point covenant-restricted advantage.

good time management.desc: Gain an extra die on extended actions with clear planning.

hardy.desc: Resist illness, poison, or fatigue more effectively.

haven.desc: Secure residence; may combine with Safe Place.

heart of stone.desc: Replace Touchstones with attachment to place or institution.

herd.desc: Marks provide double points in vitae weekly, no roll needed.

hobbyist clique.desc: Group of fellow hobbyists; bonus when leveraging them.

holistic awareness.desc: Can treat wounds with holistic methods.

honey trap.desc: Drinking your blood restores Willpower and advances Vinculum.

independent study.desc: Gain Ordo Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

information network.desc: Use your Contacts as Skill Specialties.

inspiring.desc: Boost allies' rolls with stirring words or presence.

invested.desc: Distribute Invictus Status points into free Herd, Mentor, Resources, Retainer.

investigative aide.desc: Use another Skill to complement Investigation.

investigative prodigy.desc: +2 dice on Investigation with chosen focus.

iron skin.prereq: Martial Arts 2 or Street Fighting 2, Stamina 3

iron stamina.desc: Ignore penalties from fatigue and wounds.

jack-booted thug.desc: Spend Willpower and roll Presence + Intimidation + City Status to shut people down with menace.

kindred status.desc: General Kindred standing, tracked across City, Clan, and Covenant.

kiss of the succubus.desc: Feeding that causes Swooning also inflicts Addicted.

laity.desc: Gain Lancea Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

language.desc: Gain fluency in an additional language.

library.desc: Access to research resources, adds dice to rolls.

lineage.desc: Once per session, borrow one point of sire's social/resource merits.

lingering dreams.desc: Subjects share your prophetic dreams, inflicting Swooning.

lorekeeper.desc: Lorehouse draws occultists; convert Library points into Retainer and Herd.

major domo.desc: Operate an Elysium; +2 to social rolls when hospitality is secure.

married by blood.desc: Bond with Kindred Touchstone; pool Haven/Retainers, share Status loss.

meditative mind.desc: Can enter deep meditation quickly; regain Willpower faster.

mentor.desc: Access to guidance and help from a mentor.

moderator.desc: Use Invictus network admin access as temporary Allies, Contacts, or Library.

mortal status.desc: Standing in mortal or supernatural institutions.

mother-goddess' altar.desc: Lead Crúac rituals at an Altar at full speed.

mystery cult initiation.desc: Membership in a cult; benefits depend on level.

night doctor surgery.desc: Access to illicit Carthian surgical services.

noblesse oblige.desc: Use your City Status as a Touchstone.

notary.desc: Authority to officiate Oaths; immune to Status in social rolls

oath of abstinence.desc: No need to feed while maintaining oath

oath of action.desc: Gain Discipline from liege for difficult task

oath of office.desc: Role becomes additional Mask; substitute Status for WP

oath of penance.desc: Transfer 1/10 Vitae to liege; immune to their Disciplines

oath of the hard motherfucker.desc: Attack Carthian to gain Invictus Status and resources

oath of the true knight.desc: Defend Invictus while neutral; Status as armour

one foot in the door.desc: Gain Invictus Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

pack alpha.desc: Gangrel mark a pack; teamwork rolls gain 8-Again, but failure risks Willpower.

prestigious sire.desc: Use your sire's vampiric Status in place of your own in Social actions.

primal creation.desc: Stimulates growth and fertility; can force cloning

professional training.desc: Structured professional background grants Skill and asset benefits.

pusher.desc: +2 to persuade others into bad ideas or vices.

quick draw.desc: Draw or ready weapon as reflexive action.

receptive mind.desc: Add extra target per point when using Lay Open the Mind.

relentless.desc: Push past limits; +2 to rolls when enduring hardship.

revenant impostor.desc: May replace Alternate Identity; masquerade as revenant.

sanctuary.desc: Authority to shelter one Kindred criminal per point; they act as Retainers if fed.
sanctuary.prereq: Lancea Status 2, City Status 2, Safe Place

savior of the lost.desc: Replace Humanity cost to uplift revenants with detachment roll (spend WP point).

secret society junkie.desc: Status or Mystery Cult points in human societies also count as Herd.

sell out.desc: Manipulate titles to gain benefits of one point of Status in each covenant; may count as Carthian.

sleight of hand.desc: +2 to conceal or manipulate small objects.

small unit tactics.desc: Coordinate allies in combat for bonuses.

small-framed.desc: Short or slight build; +2 to evade grapples, -1 Size.

smooth criminal.desc: Once per story, roll Manipulation + Subterfuge to end allegations against you or fellow Carthian.

social engineering.desc: Spend Willpower + roll Manipulation + Investigation to find weaknesses/openings.

sorcerous eunuch.desc: Sorcery scoured from you; penalize sorcerous effects with Resolve; can't learn blood sorcery.

speaker for the silent.desc: Channel the will of a torpid elder; can sever with Willpower.

special treat.desc: Keep ghoul with addictive blood; costs extra Vitae upkeep.

spin doctor.desc: Manipulate public perception in your favour.

staff.desc: Access to hired staff or employees.

stigmata.desc: Weekly or by WP bleed Vitae equal to points; Vitae inspires spiritually, fuels Theban Sorcery, and Willpower.

swarm form.desc: With Protean, turn into a swarm; attacks ignore Defense, deal lethal.

sympathetic.desc: People find it easy to confide in you; +2 to Empathy.

table turner.desc: Reverse power dynamics in tense social encounters.

takes one to know one.desc: +2 to discern lies in those who share your Vice.

tech-savvy.desc: Access devices of Availability +2; assign points among equipment bonus, Structure, Durability.

the mother-daughter bond.desc: Apply True Friend benefits to any Acolyte Mentor.

toss that shit right back.desc: When you dodge a thrown attack, catch it and immediately throw it back.

touchstone.desc: Gain an extra Touchstone per point; each ties to a Humanity step.

trained observer.desc: +2 to notice details and avoid surprise.

travel agent.desc: Name a host in a new domain; gain temp Allies/Contacts equal to half points; harder to intercept travel.

unbridled chaos.desc: Warps reality; alters Structure/Durability and weather

undead menses.desc: Produce blood that boosts Crúac rituals or weakens resistance to Disciplines.

unnatural affinity.desc: Feed on another type of supernatural creature as if Kindred.

unsettling gaze.desc: Exceptional success with monstrous Beast inflicts breaking point on victim.

untouchable.desc: +2 to resist attempts to socially undermine you.

vice-ridden.desc: Gain extra Willpower when indulging Vice.

viral mythology.desc: Show of divine glory inflicts awe; Herd and Allies Merits double yield.

virtuous.desc: Gain extra Willpower when upholding Virtue.

weaponise dissent.desc: City Status holders take extra damage

what you've done for her lately.desc: Once per story, Crúac rite boosts effective Crone Status for the scene.

where the bodies are buried.desc: Once per story per point, your notes can dig up dirt on a vampire you know.

wicked jaws.desc: Violent bite deals 2L or +1L if other bonuses apply.

air of menace.desc: +2 to menace; others spend Willpower to pick fights. Social manoeuvring harder.

cohesive unit.desc: +2 teamwork. (••) bonus dice per scene. (•••) rerolls.

covert operative.desc: Ambushes deny 10-Again to detect and grant +3 Initiative first turn.

defender.desc: Bonus Willpower for protecting loved ones; losing them causes crisis.

empath.desc: Wits + Empathy vs Manipulation + Subterfuge for mental state insight; can open Doors or ease breaking points.

esoteric armoury.desc: Enough esoterica to supply the banes of ephemeral entities with a Rank up to your rating in this Merit.

finger on the pulse.desc: You are immersed in the Cacophony, and do not suffer the drawback of Cacophony Savvy.

honey with vinegar.desc: You earn influence from Allies, Contacts, and wide Mortal Status one step lower than normal. 1 point of influence at 2 dots or 4 dots respectively.

iron chin.desc: Immune to Beaten Down from bashing. (••••) immune entirely.

loaded for bear.desc: Gain extra reloads on weapons, including single shot weapons.

object fetishism.desc: Obsess over a possession for a Specialty. Regain Willpower each session; Willpower on that Specialty exaggerates success and failure.

peacemaker.desc: Spend Willpower to negotiate peace via Social Manoeuvring. (•••) can talk down supernatural rages.

picket line.desc: Each chapter, you have a pool of dots equal to their Contacts (max 5), which can be applied to Allies separately or as one amount, to raise their effective level when taking the Social Merit Blocking action.

punch drunk.desc: Spend Willpower to preserve your last Health point, upgrading preexisting damage instead.

support network.desc: Spend Willpower on supportive ties to add dots to breaking point rolls.

survivalist.desc: Resist Extreme Cold/Heat for Stamina hours.

trigger discipline.desc: Increase a firearm's effective capacity, or allow an additional long burst at high capacity.

whipping boy.desc: Gain an additional Dirge: The Whipping Boy. Regain a point of Willpower when serving another vampire earns ostracism, ridicule, or distrust. Regain all spent Willpower on a breaking point suffered in service.
